html:
Exclusive to:

Succulents are a type of plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They spawn around the Lake at the Oasis only during the time of Summer and provide 1 Succulent when picked. When eaten, the Succulents provide 1 health.

Item

Succulent is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They are obtained by picking a Succulent at the Oasis in the Desert Biome and can be used to craft Potted Succulents.

Dried Succulent

Dried Succulent are made from drying Succulent on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Succulent Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Usage

×2

×6 / 4 / 2

Trivia

  • Succulents were added in the Against the Grain update.

Gallery

  • Dried variant concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.

"succulent_plant"
“Aloe there.”
–Wilson
“It's a small, unburned plant.”
–Willow
“Is tough plant.”
–Wolfgang
“Life is resilient.”
–Wendy
“IT'S A PLANT”
–WX-78
“Uniquely adapted to arid climates.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a plant, eh?”
–Woodie
“Doesn't look that succulent to me.”
–Maxwell
“Hearty greenery.”
–Wigfrid
“We think it's a cactus.”
–Webber
“What an adorable little plant.”
–Warly
“Friend! Good to see you!”
–Wormwood
“This plant don't give up easy.”
–Winona
“A strong willed plant, desert born.”
–Wortox
“How you live in place like this?”
–Wurt
“They're from the cactus family!”
–Walter
“I'm afraid I can't stop to admire every bit of scenery.”
–Wanda
Succulents are a type of plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They spawn around the Lake at the Oasis only during the time of Summer and provide 1 Succulent when picked. When eaten, the Succulents provide 1 health.

"succulent_picked"
“I could eat that, but I'd rather not.”
–Wilson
“It's been picked.”
–Willow
“Tough plant is not dead yet.”
–Wolfgang
“Plucked from the safety of its desert home.”
–Wendy
“IT DIDN'T STAND A CHANCE”
–WX-78
“It will wither if not replanted.”
–Wickerbottom
“There's a lot of water in there for such a tiny plant.”
–Woodie
“It didn't put up much of a fight.”
–Maxwell
“Tis nöt föodstuff.”
–Wigfrid
“It got picked.”
–Webber
“I wonder if I can find some culinary use for this.”
–Warly
“Keep you safe, friend”
–Wormwood
“It's been picked.”
–Winona
“Leaves of a plant we picked.”
–Wortox
“Oop, broke it.”
–Wurt
“They're pretty useful for minor cuts and burns.”
–Walter
“I guess it's technically edible.”
–Wanda
Succulent is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They are obtained by picking a Succulent at the Oasis in the Desert Biome and can be used to craft Potted Succulents.

"succulent_picked_dried"
“Nice dry.”
–Wilson
“Mmm... So dry. So flammable.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang appreciate delicate fragrance.”
–Wolfgang
“I like how they smell.”
–Wendy
“DEHYDRATED PLANT MATTER”
–WX-78
“The drying process enhances the aroma.”
–Wickerbottom
“Smells nice.”
–Woodie
“They're all shrivelled up.”
–Maxwell
“T'wöuld make a möst wörthy öffering tö the göds!”
–Wigfrid
“Did we pick these?”
–Webber
“A fine ingredient!”
–Warly
“Dry stuff”
–Wormwood
“These are nice and dry.”
–Winona
“I'd eyed it'd dried.”
–Wortox
“Dried bits not yummy.”
–Wurt
“Dried perfectly!”
–Walter
“Smells lovely.”
–Wanda
Dried Succulent are made from drying Succulent on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Succulent Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

'''Succulents''' are a type of plants exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. They spawn around the [[Lake]] at the [[Set Piece#Oasis|Oasis]] only during the time of [[Seasons/Summer|Summer]] and provide 1 [[Petals#Succulent|Succulent]] when picked. When eaten, the Succulents provide 1 health.

'''Succulent''' is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. They are obtained by picking a [[Flower#Succulent|Succulent]] at the [[Set Piece#Oasis|Oasis]] in the [[Desert]] Biome and can be used to craft [[Potted Succulent]]s.{{Clear}}
